description: Side-by-side markdown editor with live preview. Composes a textarea with markdown-viewer.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name reflected to the textarea

attributes.name: highlight
attributes.description: Pass highlight attribute to the preview viewer

attributes.name: data-tab-indent
attributes.description: Tab key inserts spaces instead of moving focus

attributes.name: data-theme
attributes.description: Theme propagated to the preview pane

events.name: markdown-editor:change
events.description: Fired on blur after content changed

properties.name: textarea
properties.description: Reference to the internal textarea element
